Config.Title: Event Horizon
Config.AttachedObjects.Help: For players that remain visible, additionally hide:
Config.DisableCullingBelowPlayerCount: Disable when player count is below
Config.LowPlayerCountCullingSuspended: Hiding is suspended while few players are present.
Config.DutyCullingSuspended: Hiding is suspended while you are in a duty.
Config.LimitVisiblePlayerCount.Help: Fallback limit. If the keep rules below allow more other players than this, the extra players are still hidden. This limit follows object table scan order and does not guarantee priority between keep rules.
Config.KeepRecentChatPlayers.Help: Players who recently spoke or sent an emote are kept for 5 minutes.
Config.KeepTargetAndFocusPlayers.Help: Your current target and focus target will not be hidden. They stay kept for 30 seconds after you switch away.
Config.KeepPlayersTargetingMe.Help: Players targeting you will not be hidden. They stay kept for 60 seconds after they stop targeting you.
